description: Voyago is a polished travel-discovery app built with MVUX and Uno.Extensions Navigation. A responsive shell (NavigationView rail on desktop, bottom TabBar on mobile) hosts Home, Search, Trips, Favorites and Profile, plus a full-screen destination detail page reached with navigation-passed data. It demonstrates a branded icon and splash, a bundled type + design-token system, vector PathIcon iconography, a hero carousel, and distinct light/dark theming from one palette.

messages.content:
Generate a polished travel discovery app with:
- mock state
- an adaptive shell: sidebar navigation on desktop, bottom tab bar on mobile
- a clean, image-rich Material UI

Home screen:
- greeting header with user avatar and notifications
- a search entry (destinations, flights, hotels)
- a hero destination carousel
- quick action shortcuts
- a "Recommended for You" horizontal list of trips
- explore categories grid

Navigation:
- Home, Search, Trips, Favorites and Profile pages
- adaptive: NavigationView sidebar on wide screens, bottom TabBar on narrow screens

Include:
- full working code
- navigation between pages
- mock state
- seeded sample data (destinations, trips, categories)
Here's your **Voyago** travel app! It's built and running in the preview.

suggestedPrompts: Add a real booking flow with dates and travellers
Add search filtering to the Search page
Add a map view of destinations

messages.content:
Generate a polished travel discovery app with:
- mock state
- an adaptive shell: sidebar navigation on desktop, bottom tab bar on mobile
- a clean, image-rich Material UI

Home screen:
- greeting header with user avatar and notifications
- a search entry (destinations, flights, hotels)
- a hero destination carousel
- quick action shortcuts
- a "Recommended for You" horizontal list of trips
- explore categories grid

Navigation:
- Home, Search, Trips, Favorites and Profile pages
- adaptive: NavigationView sidebar on wide screens, bottom TabBar on narrow screens

Include:
- full working code
- navigation between pages
- mock state
- seeded sample data (destinations, trips, categories)

Voyago is a single-project Uno Platform app (Voyago/Voyago.csproj) targeting iOS, Android, WebAssembly and desktop (Skia). It uses MVUX and Uno.Extensions Navigation.

**Architecture (structural, not an exhaustive file list):**
- **App entry** — App.xaml.cs configures the host with UseToolkitNavigation + UseNavigation(ReactiveViewModelMappings.ViewModelMappings, RegisterRoutes) and navigates to Shell. Routes nest: "" (Shell) -> Main (nested Home[default], Search, Trips, Favorites, Profile) + DestinationDetail as a full-screen sibling of Main (not a tab), reached with navigation-passed data via DataViewMap<DestinationDetailPage, DestinationDetailModel, Destination>.
- **Shell** — Presentation/Shell.xaml hosts a utu:ExtendedSplashScreen (the branded Voyago mark drawn in native XAML shapes) with an ILoadable that always clears IsExecuting; navigation injects Main as its content.
- **Responsive shell** — Presentation/MainPage.xaml switches a NavigationView rail (wide) and a bottom utu:TabBar (narrow) purely with {utu:Responsive} (no AdaptiveTrigger/VSM); nav icons are inline PathIcon vector geometry; the TabBar carries a bottom SafeArea inset.
- **Pages/Models** — each page (Home/Search/Trips/Favorites/Profile) has a matching partial-record MVUX *Model with seeded mock data. DestinationDetailModel derives from the injected Destination and exposes an IState<bool> IsBooked + Book() command. Shared records (Destination, TripItem, ExploreCategory) live in Presentation/SharedTypes.cs.
- **Design system (App.xaml is a thin manifest that only merges dictionaries):** ThemeColors.xaml is the Simple-theme ColorOverrideSource (dusk/violet palette, distinct light/dark); ControlThemeOverrides.xaml holds per-theme lightweight-styling overrides (e.g. the NavigationView selection indicator); Styles.xaml (merged last) holds the type-scale ramp, spacing/radius/motion tokens, the DefaultResponsiveLayout, crisp stateful button styles, the BoolToVisibility + Icon converters, and the value-driven trip-status pill DataTemplateSelector. Bundled fonts (Plus Jakarta Sans + Fraunces, static per weight) live in Assets/Fonts.
- **Icons** — Presentation/Icons.cs stores Fluent vector path data surfaced through IconConverter, drawn as PathIcon/Path (no symbol font), so icons render in Studio/Hot Design.
- **Branding** — Assets/Icons + Assets/Splash drive a Uno.Resizetizer app icon and splash across every platform.
- **Imagery** — destination/category photos are curated, freely-licensed images bundled under Assets/Photos and referenced via ms-appx:///Assets/Photos/*.jpg (matched to each label; local assets load on every head).

All data is mock/seeded in the *Model records. The user may ask me to modify it.
